rows.name: Dhigurah
rows.description: Dhigurah is a local island in Vaavu Atoll known for its long sandy beaches and vibrant local culture. The island is famous for whale shark and manta ray encounters, making it a popular destination for marine enthusiasts. It offers a more authentic Maldivian experience compared to resort islands.
rows.highlights: ["Whale Shark Encounters", "Manta Ray Watching", "Local Culture", "Beautiful Beaches"]
